Description: Defines approval requirements and restrictions for privileged accounts
Requires periodic review and validation of privileged account access
Monitors privileged account activity and raises alerts for unusual behavior
Requires MFA for privileged and sensitive systems access
Applies conditional access based on device posture and user context
Reviews user access rights on a recurring schedule and removes stale access
Filters phishing attempts and reduces malicious email delivery to users
Provides recurring training and simulations for phishing and social engineering
Tracks training completion and phishing simulation outcomes
Identifies known vulnerabilities across internet facing systems and internal hosts
Defines patching timelines and prioritization for critical vulnerabilities
Maintains current inventory and ownership data for critical assets
Provides continuous monitoring and response for suspicious endpoint activity
Restricts execution to approved applications and reduces malware impact
Protects endpoint data at rest and reduces exposure from device loss
Defines least privilege access requirements for cloud identities and roles
Reviews cloud settings and flags deviations from approved baselines

Control Name: Public Access Protection for Cloud Storage
Description: Prevents public exposure of cloud storage objects and shares
Aggregates logs and correlates events for threat detection and investigation
Defines monitoring thresholds and escalation criteria for critical alerts
Prevents unauthorized transfer of sensitive data outside approved channels
Defines sensitivity levels handling requirements and retention periods
Requires security review during design development and release activities
Identifies insecure libraries and code issues before production release
Protects credentials and secrets from exposure in code and automation
Standardizes incident handling steps and documents lessons learned after response activities
Requires periodic simulation exercises to validate response readiness
Ensures evidence timeline and impact details are captured during incidents
Defines backup scope retention periods and recovery objectives
Validates backup integrity and confirms restoration can be completed successfully
Maintains recovery procedures and escalation paths for critical systems
Flags unusual data access or exfiltration behavior by privileged users

Control Name: Data Access Review for High Risk Users
Description: Reviews data access for sensitive systems and high risk users on a schedule
Requires MFA and approved methods for remote access to corporate resources
Defines minimum security settings for managed mobile devices
Sets requirements for personal devices accessing corporate resources
Provides current inventory visibility for devices and systems across the environment
Validates systems against approved secure configuration baselines
Limits lateral movement by separating critical systems and user networks
Reviews network controls and removes unnecessary access paths
Provides recurring education on phishing safe handling and reporting expectations
Tracks completion rates and highlights training gaps by business unit
Requires review and approval for changes affecting critical systems
Defines approved settings for servers workstations and network devices
Stores evidence artifacts for control operation and internal review
Schedules periodic testing of control design and operating effectiveness
Requires periodic review and signoff of security policies and standards
Collects third party security information before onboarding and renewal
Reviews vendor security posture and contract obligations on an ongoing basis
Requires documented approval and logging for sensitive data transfers

Designed for Weak MFA and Conditional Access Coverage and aligned to the Identity & Access Management risk area. This control supports monitoring, evidence collection, and periodic review. It is intended to respond after an issue occurs and restore control.
